overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character with red hair running along a dark coastal beach at night, approaching ruined concrete structures. The character enters the ocean and swims underwater, revealing a submerged post-apocalyptic environment with teal-colored lighting and caustic water effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with post-apocalyptic concrete ruins

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sandy shoreline toward the ruined concrete structures ahead

entered.detail: large dilapidated concrete structure with broken walls and debris
wide sandy shoreline stretching along the water's edge
steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation rising from the beach
dark ocean water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
weathered wooden posts remnants of an old dock or pier structure

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dark sandy beach at night, with a large ruined concrete building looming ahead. Waves crash gently on the right while a rocky cliff rises to the left. The scene is bathed in cool teal moonlight, creating a post-apocalyptic coastal atmosphere.

events.description: character transitions from running on sand to wading into shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: wading into the shallow water and beginning to swim toward the ruined structures

entered.detail: knee-deep ocean water with visible sandy bottom and rippling surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow coastal waters, transitioning from sand to surf. Waves splash around the character's legs as they wade deeper, with the ruined building now closer ahead. The wooden pilings become more prominent on the right as the beach recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: submerged coastal area with underwater terrain

events.description: camera and character submerge completely underwater, transitioning to underwater view with caustic lighting

agents.ego_description: swimming underwater through the submerged ruins, navigating toward rock formations

entered.detail: submerged rocky outcrops and coral-like structures on the ocean floor
sandy seabed with rippled patterns and scattered debris
undulating water surface visible overhead with light filtering through

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts entirely underwater as the character dives beneath the surface. The environment transforms to a submerged world with teal caustic light patterns dancing on the sandy ocean floor. Rocky formations appear on the right while the surface ripples overhead, creating an immersive underwater exploration scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate moonlit beach that transitions into a submerged post-apocalyptic underwater world. It begins with a character running across dark sand between a rocky cliff and crashing waves, heading toward a looming ruined concrete building under cool teal moonlight. As the character reaches the shoreline, the scene shifts from dry land to surf, with waves splashing around their legs while wooden pilings emerge on the right. The perspective then plunges entirely beneath the surface, transforming the environment into a deep teal void where caustic light patterns dance across the sandy ocean floor. Finally, the view expands to reveal rocky formations and the shimmering ripple of the surface overhead as the character explores the sunken landscape.
